name: UTSTARCOM HOLDINGS CORP.
business: UTStarcom provides IP-based network solutions including IPTV, Internet TV, and broadband for cable and telecom operators. The majority of its business is based in China, Japan, India, and other Asia markets.

exposures.sentence: We are one of the leading provider of IP-based network solutions including the integration and support services in IPTV, Interactive ("iD") TV, Internet TV and Broadband for cable and telecom operators.
